method: features.json carries no selected_by_pct, so EO is triangulated from league.json (15-man mini-league template = Haaland/B.Fernandes/Gabriel; differentials clustered at 6.7% = 1 of 15 managers) plus GW38 web signals (Haaland ~62.5% owned and ~35% captaincy poll; B.Fernandes 2nd at ~26%; Bowen ~10%; Salah ~5th). CRITICAL OVERRIDE: Haaland and Gabriel are CONFIRMED OUT for GW38, which collapses their effective ownership to ~0 and hollows out the template for the season finale.

template_players.name: Haaland
template_players.note: CONFIRMED OUT / rested. Season-long #1 template (62.5% own, ~35% captaincy) but blanks GW38, so real EO collapses to ~0. The biggest equaliser of the finale: ~60% of rivals carry a dead/benched asset. Owning him is NOT rank protection this week, and any (C) on him scores 0.

template_players.name: Gabriel
template_players.note: CONFIRMED OUT (Arsenal heavy rotation, title secured + European final). High season template ownership but blanks GW38 -> zero real EO. Not owning him costs nothing this week.

template_players.name: B.Fernandes
template_players.note: The ONLY genuinely live template player this GW. ~26% captaincy share and 2nd-favourite armband; with Haaland out he becomes the de facto top-10k captain. User does NOT own him -> largest single rank-swing risk if he hauls.

template_players.name: M.Salah
template_players.note: Semi-template among the elite and user OWNS him (as VC). Liverpool's run-in collapse lowered captaincy appeal (~5th in poll) but he is a safe, high-floor live armband now that Haaland is out.

differentials.name: Rogers
differentials.upside: OWNED by user, starts. AVL host Man City in Guardiola's final game — open, high-event fixture. Sub-8% EO so any return is net rank gain vs the field. Strong ceiling differential already held.

differentials.name: Mateta
differentials.upside: OWNED, starts. With Haaland out he is one of the few high-ceiling forwards the user can captain. Sub-8% EO premium attacker = differential captain option.

differentials.name: Watkins
differentials.upside: AVL forward in the same City fixture. Captain-as-differential candidate; the contrarian AVL double-up (with Rogers) on an open game is the rank-CLIMB play.

differentials.name: Bruno G.
differentials.upside: NEW midfielder, low EO, reliable minutes + attacking returns. Safe-floor differential to gain on the leader.

differentials.name: Enzo
differentials.upside: CHE midfielder, low ownership, set-piece and goal threat. Pure ceiling one-week punt.

differentials.name: J.Timber
differentials.upside: ARS attacking-FB but rotation-exposed (Arsenal title secured, Euro final) — lower confidence; differential only if confirmed to start.

captain_ownership.name: Haaland
captain_ownership.note: Pre-news ~35% of armbands; CONFIRMED OUT so all those captains must pivot late or score 0 — a massive auto-equaliser. Gemini's Haaland (C) pick is now INVALID and must be overridden.

captain_ownership.name: B.Fernandes
captain_ownership.note: Inherits most of Haaland's displaced armbands -> now the top-10k consensus captain. The captaincy you must match-or-beat to defend rank.

captain_ownership.name: M.Salah
captain_ownership.note: Safe live alternative the user ALREADY owns as VC. If the user does not bring in Bruno, Salah is the highest-floor in-squad captain.

captain_ownership.name: Bowen
captain_ownership.note: User's CURRENT captain (~10% poll). Mid-tier differential armband — reasonable contrarian punt but lower ceiling than Bruno; rank risk if Bruno hauls.

captain_ownership.name: Watkins/Rogers (AVL)
captain_ownership.note: Deepest differential captaincy on the open City fixture. Highest variance, biggest rank-climb potential.

rank_strategy: Final GW, pure rank race in a 15-man league (user 7th, leader Krisss. 2365). The template is HOLLOW: Haaland (62.5%) and Gabriel (38%) both BLANK, so ~60% of rivals waste a slot and the usual must-own protection is gone — a rare equaliser, so lean INTO differentials. Priority 1: move the captain off Haaland (Gemini's invalid pick) onto a live asset. B.Fernandes is the safe rank-DEFENCE armband; Salah (already in squad as VC) is the no-cost floor pivot; Mateta and the AVL pair (Rogers owned + Watkins) are the aggressive rank-CLIMB armbands given the open AVL v City game. Priority 2: ensure 11 live starters — bench any dead Haaland/Gabriel-type asset. Differentials already owned (Rogers, Mateta) are free upside since sub-8% EO means any return out-scores the field. Biggest single risk: NOT owning B.Fernandes while he hauls and the league captains him.
summary: GW38 template is a mirage: Haaland (62.5% own, ~35% (C)) and Gabriel (38%) are CONFIRMED OUT and blank, neutralising their effective ownership and erasing the must-own shield — a finale equaliser. B.Fernandes is the ONLY live template player and becomes the de facto top-10k captain (~40% of armbands inherited from Haaland); user does not own him -> league's biggest rank risk. Salah (owned, VC) is the no-cost safe captain pivot now Haaland is out; Mateta and the AVL pair (Rogers owned, Watkins) are the high-ceiling sub-8% EO differential armbands to climb from 7th. Gemini's Haaland (C) pick is INVALID and must be overridden.
